request: Pick up backlog ticket setup-changelog-tracker-for-unpushed-commits-f22a. Build a new `changelog` skill that follows the keepachangelog.com 1.0.0 spec and wire it into the workflow so AFTER `/grant-commit` the changelog skill runs FIRST, THEN `/commit` runs. Additional in-scope deliverables: update the public website (site-src/**) to describe the new phase, redesign the SVG architecture image to a grid / bento-grid layout, and make SVGs responsive for mobile. Touches CLAUDE.md Article IV (phase ordering), docs/init/seed.md (genesis spec), src/CLAUDE.template.md + src/seed.template.md (byte mirrors), .claude/skills/commit/SKILL.md (prereq + ordering), settings.json hook wiring if applicable, site-src/ narrative, and the SVG asset(s).
